message:
fix(tldr): improve accessibility, error handling, and component polish

Addresses multiple UX issues identified in the /tldr page audit,
improving accessibility compliance, error resilience, and visual polish.

## Error Handling Improvements

### app/tldr/page.tsx
- Wrapped TldrSynergyDiagram in ErrorBoundary with graceful fallback
- Wrapped TldrToolGrid in ErrorBoundary to prevent cascading failures
- Added proper aria-label to scroll indicator button
- Improved component organization and import structure

## Star Count Formatting

### components/tldr-hero.tsx
- Integrated formatStarCount utility for consistent star display
- Stars now show as "10K" instead of raw "10000"
- Added tooltip with full count on hover (e.g., "10,000 stars")
- Fixed potential edge cases with undefined star counts

## Dynamic Content

### components/tldr-synergy-diagram.tsx
- Replaced hardcoded "7 Tools" with dynamic count from actual data
- Now shows accurate count: `${coreTools.length + supportingTools.length} Tools`
- Prevents display discrepancy as tools are added/removed

## Accessibility (WCAG 2.5.5 Compliance)

### components/tldr-tool-card.tsx
- Added min-h-[44px] to expand/collapse button for touch target compliance
- Ensures 44x44px minimum touch target on all interactive elements
- Improved button padding for better mobile usability

## Visual Polish
- Consistent scroll indicator behavior across components
- Improved animation timing for reduced motion preference
- Better visual hierarchy with updated spacing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
